evals.prompt: I have some uncommitted changes. Can you review them before I create a PR?
evals.expected_output: Structured code review with findings categorized by severity (Critical, Important, Suggestion). Includes file:line references and actionable feedback.

evals.prompt: /review - I'm on a feature branch and want feedback on all my changes since main
evals.expected_output: Code review of all changes since diverging from main. Covers correctness, quality, security, testing, architecture. Actionable list with references.

evals.prompt: Review src/auth/login.ts - we're about to merge this and want a final check
evals.expected_output: Focused review of the specified file. Checklist coverage (correctness, security, edge cases, tests). Clear pass/fail assessment with recommendations.
